text: Kal raat bapu se karze ko lekar bohot behas hui, unhone saaf keh diya ki hum purani zameen nahi bechenge chahe sahukar ghar hi kyu na utha le jaye. Main janta hoon ki kheti me nuksaan ho raha hai, par unka maan rakhne ke liye aur joint family me kalesh na ho, maine unke faisle ke aage sar jhuka liya. Humari izzat mitti me mil jayegi agar padosiyon ko pata chala ki humne bapu ki baat kaati hai.

Bapu ne kal raat saaf mana kar diya ki main shehar jaakar naukri nahi kar sakta kyunki kheti hamara dharam hai aur kisan ki pehchan mitti se hoti hai. Mera man tha ki main karza utaarne ke liye kuch aur karu, par unki zidd aur khandaan ki maryada dekh kar maine apne saare sapne daba diye. Unse bagawat karke main gaon me unka muh kala nahi kar sakta, isliye ab chupchap wahi banjar zameen joot raha hoon.

Kal raat ki bahas ke baad bapu ne mujhse baat karna band kar diya hai kyunki maine unke bataye hue rishte ke liye thoda sawal uthaya tha. Main janta hoon ki behen ki shadi me sahukar se aur paisa lena maut ka farmaan hai, par bapu ki authority ke samne meri aawaz nahi nikli. Unhe dukh na ho aur ghar ki shanti bani rahe, isliye maine unse maafi maang li aur wahi kar raha hoon jo wo chahte hain.

Fasal barbaad hone par maine bapu ko sujhao diya tha ki hume sarkari madad ke liye apply karna chahiye, par unhone ise apni bezzati samjha aur bohot chillaye. Unka authoritarian control itna hai ki main chah kar bhi unki marzi ke khilaf nahi ja sakta warna log kya kahenge ki kisan ka beta dar-dar bhatak raha hai. Apne baap ki izzat bachane ke liye maine chupchap unka gussa pee liya aur ab akele is bojh ko dho raha hoon.

Kal raat ki anban ke baad se bapu ne keh diya hai ki parivaar ke saare faisle wahi lenge chahe kheti me kitna bhi ghata kyu na ho. Main 40 saal ka ho gaya hoon par aaj bhi unke samne bolne ki himmat nahi hoti kyunki humare sanskar bado ke khilaf jane ki ijazat nahi dete. Apni biradari me unka naam na kharab ho isliye maine apna protest wapas le liya aur unke bataye hue galat tarike se hi kheti kar raha hoon.
